storeOs.invocation: Called as a subworkflow by orchestrate-phase1. Expects Subworkflow Trigger input: { project_id, normalized_intake_payload, runtime_config }
storeOs.output: { project_id, artifact_path, artifact_name, store_profile, runtime_config, status, notes }
notes: brand_maturity defaults to 'new' — no reliable signal available at intake time.
catalog_type is derived from active_product_count heuristic — user should verify.
operating_mode is mapped from publish_mode: no-publish/draft-only → draft-first, draft-and-review → staging-first.
AJV dependency: requires ajv@8 available in n8n's node_modules. Try ajv/dist/2020 first, falls back to ajv.
